mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_notification ( title, content, type, related_id, related_type, sender_id, sender_name, priority, status, require_confirmation, confirmation_deadline, send_status, send_error, del_flag, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{relatedId}, #{relatedType}, #{senderId}, #{senderName}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{requireConfirmation}, #{confirmationDeadline}, #{sendStatus}, #{sendError}, '0', #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE project_notification
title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, send_status = #{sendStatus}, send_error = #{sendError}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE project_notification SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_notification WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT n.* FROM project_notification n INNER JOIN project_notification_recipient r ON r.notification_id = n.notification_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND n.del_flag = '0' AND r.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY n.create_time DESC

SELECT n.* FROM project_notification n INNER JOIN project_notification_recipient r ON r.notification_id = n.notification_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_read = 0 AND n.del_flag = '0' AND r.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY n.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM project_notification n INNER JOIN project_notification_recipient r ON r.notification_id = n.notification_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_read = 0 AND n.del_flag = '0' AND r.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO project_notification_recipient ( notification_id, user_id, user_name, is_read, is_confirmed, is_notified, del_flag, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.notificationId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.userName}, 0, 0, 0, '0', NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE project_notification_recipient SET is_read = 1, read_time = NOW() WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE project_notification_recipient SET is_read = 1, read_time = NOW() WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE project_notification_recipient SET is_read = 1, read_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE project_notification_recipient SET is_confirmed = 1, confirmed_time = NOW() WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE project_notification_recipient SET is_confirmed = 1, confirmed_time = NOW() WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_notification_recipient WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT r.* FROM project_notification_recipient r INNER JOIN project_notification n ON n.notification_id = r.notification_id WHERE n.confirmation_deadline <= #{deadline} AND r.is_confirmed = 0 AND n.require_confirmation = 1 AND n.del_flag = '0' AND r.del_flag = '0'
SELECT * FROM project_notification_recipient WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_notified = 0 AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE project_notification_send_log SET send_status = #{sendStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, retry_count = retry_count + 1 WHERE log_id = #{logId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_notification WHERE require_confirmation = 1 AND confirmation_deadline <= NOW() AND status = 'PENDING' AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE project_notification SET del_flag = '1', update_time = NOW() WHERE related_id = #{relatedId} AND related_type = #{relatedType} AND del_flag = '0'

UPDATE project_notification_recipient r INNER JOIN project_notification n ON n.notification_id = r.notification_id SET r.del_flag = '1', r.update_time = NOW() WHERE n.related_id = #{relatedId} AND n.related_type = #{relatedType} AND r.del_flag = '0'
